name: TRAFILERIE ALLUMINIO ALEXIA S.P.A.
message: Trafilerie Alluminio Alexia has been working aluminium for more than a hundred years obtaining extraordinary results and transforming aluminium billets into a wide variety of finished profiles, in large and small quantities, with a particular care to prototyping needs of our customers. Trafilerie Alluminio Alexia can satisfy any request because the company is part of a powerful and qualified industrial system, able to provide the most flexible product solutions. alluminioalexia.com
